Captain.name: Captain
Captain.equipped_with: A Captain is equipped with: Frag grenades.

option_groups.header: One Captain per army can be upgraded to a Colonel for +15 points.

abilities: Officer: A Captain issues 1 order.
Colonel: A Colonel issues 1 additional order.

Leman Russ Tank Commander.name: Leman Russ Tank Commander
Leman Russ Tank Commander.equipped_with: A Leman Russ Tank Commander is equipped with: Punisher gatling cannon; Heavy flamer.

option_groups.header: Only one Leman Russ Tank Commander per army.
May swap the Punisher gatling cannon
May be equipped with sponsons
May swap the Heavy flamer

abilities: Move through cover
Lumbering Behemoth: The model may not receive an "Advance" order. Additionally, it always counts as having received a "Stand & Shoot" order when shooting its weapons.
Officer: A Leman Russ Tank Commander issues 1 order.

Lord Commissar.name: Lord Commissar
Lord Commissar.equipped_with: A Lord Commissar is equipped with: Frag grenades.

option_groups.header: Only one Lord Commissar per army.

abilities: Aura of Discipline: Friendly units in a 12" radius use the Lord Commissar's Leadership value.
Officer: A Lord Commissar issues 1 order.
Statutory Execution: Each time time a friendly unit within a 6" radius fails a Leadership test, a model is removed from the unit and the Leadership test is repeated without any penalty.

Primaris Psyker.name: Primaris Psyker
Primaris Psyker.equipped_with: A Primaris Psyker is equipped with: Frag grenades.
abilities: It's for your own good: Instead of suffering a Perils of the Warp attack, the model is immediately slain if a Commissar is within 6".
Officer: A Primaris Psyker issues 1 order.
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power and deny 1 power per battle round. It knows Smite and all powers from a chosen discipline.

Salamander Command.name: Salamander Command
Salamander Command.equipped_with: A Salamander is equipped with: Heavy flamer; Heavy flamer.

option_groups.header: May swap one Heavy flamer
May swap the other Heavy flamer

abilities: Fast
Officer: A Salamander Command Vehicle issues 1 order.
Vox: Units equipped with a vox always count as being within range of this officer.

Conscript Infantry Platoon.name: Conscript Infantry Platoon
Conscript Infantry Platoon.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Lasgun.

option_groups.header: Can't be selected without a Platoon Command Squad.
For every ten models, one Conscript may be equipped with a Special weapon
For every ten models, two other Conscripts may form a Heavy weapons team

abilities: Send the next wave!: If the unit is below half its target strength or is destroyed, it can be removed from the field once per game at the end of the battle round and automatically reappears as a reserve at full target strength in the next battle round.

Hive Gangers.name: Hive Gangers
Hive Gangers.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Gang firearm; Gang pistol.

option_groups.header: The entire squad may receive one of the following upgrades per model
Each model may be equipped with
Up to two models may swap their Gang firearms
One model may swap the Gang firearm

abilities: Hive Scum: This unit may not make use of any order.
Sniper: Models with a Gang sniper rifle receive a +1 bonus to their BS value.
Upgrades:
Cawdor: The model gains +1 Leadership.
Delaque: The model gains "Infiltrator".
Escher: All weapons of the model gain "Poison(5+)".
Goliath: The model gains +1 Strength and +1 Toughness.
Orlock: Another model may swap their Gang firearm.
Van Saar: The model gains a 5+ armour save.

Infantry Squad.name: Infantry Squad
Infantry Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Frag grenades; Lasgun.

option_groups.header: Can't be selected without a Platoon Command Squad.
One Guardsman may be equipped with a vox for +5 points.
Two other Guardsmen may form a Heavy weapons team
Another Guardsman may be equipped with a Special weapon
If no Heavy weapons team is formed, another Guardsman may be equipped with a Special weapon.
The Sergeant may be upgraded to a Veteran Sergeant for +5 points and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Combined squads: During deployment, Infantry squads can be combined with any number of other Infantry squads. They act as a single unit for the rest of the game.
Sniper: Models with a sniper rifle receive a +1 bonus to their BS value.

Mechanised Infantry.name: Mechanised Infantry
Mechanised Infantry.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Frag grenades; Lasgun.

option_groups.header: The unit must select a dedicated transport vehicle and start the game in it. 25% (round up) of the transport's point cost are counted towards the 25% Troops requirement.
One Guardsman may be equipped with a vox for +5 points.
Two other Guardsmen may form a Heavy weapons team
Another Guardsman may be equipped with a Special weapon
If no Heavy weapons team is formed, another Guardsman may be equipped with a Special weapon.
The Sergeant may be upgraded to a Veteran Sergeant for +5 points and gains access to weapons and gear from the Armory.

abilities: Combined squads: During deployment, Infantry squads can be combined with any number of other Infantry squads. They act as a single unit for the rest of the game.
Sniper: Models with a sniper rifle receive a +1 bonus to their BS value.

Penal Legion Squad.name: Penal Legion Squad

option_groups.header: The entire squad may receive one of the following upgrades per model

abilities: Explosive Collars: Each time this unit fails a Leadership test, a model is removed from the unit and the Leadership test is repeated without any penalty.
Last Chancers: This unit may not make use of any order.
Upgrades:
Gunslingers: The model gains a Lasgun.
Knife Fighters: The model gains a Close combat weapon and a Las pistol.

Platoon Command Squad.name: Platoon Command Squad
Platoon Command Squad.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Lasgun; Frag grenades.

option_groups.header:
The following units can/must be selected for each Platoon Command Squad. All selections including Platoon Command Squad occupy a single Troops slot and count as Troops:
- 2-5 Infantry Squads
- 0-1 Conscript Infantry Platoon
- 0-2 Special Weapon Squads
- 0-3 Heavy Weapon Teams
One Guardsman may be equipped with a vox for +5 points.
Two other Guardsmen may form a Heavy weapons team
All remaining Guardmen may be equipped with a Special weapon

abilities: Chain of command: Units that activate within 12" of the Lieutenant can receive orders as if an officer were in range.
Sniper: Models with a sniper rifle receive a +1 bonus to their BS value.

Astropath.name: Astropath
Astropath.equipped_with: A Astropath is equipped with: Las pistol; Telepath staff.
abilities: Command Squad
Advisor: For each HQ selection, one Astropath may be selected that does not occupy an Elite slot.
It's for your own good: Instead of suffering a Perils of the Warp attack, the model is immediately slain if a Commissar is within 6".
Psyker: The model can cast 1 power per battle round. It one power from the Telepathy discipline.

Atlas Recovery Vehicle.name: Atlas Recovery Vehicle
Atlas Recovery Vehicle.equipped_with: An Atlas is equipped with: Heavy bolter.

option_groups.header: May swap the Heavy bolter

abilities: Recovery Vehicle: When this unit activates with an Advance order, if it is within 1" of a vehicle wreck or a friendly vehicle with a current Move of 0", it may tow it instead of moving normally. Both this unit and the towed wreck or vehicle may move up to 6", and must end their movement within 1" of each other. Follow all normal rules for terrain.

Bullgryns.name: Bullgryns
Bullgryns.equipped_with: Every model is equipped with: Bullgryn maul; Brute shield; Frag bombs.

option_groups.header: Any model may swap their Brute shield for a Plate shield for +17 points each.
Any model may swap their Bullgryn maul for a Grenadier gauntlet for +17 points.

abilities: Furious Charge, Massive(1)
Brute shield: The model gains the abilities "Deflect" and "Parry".
Plate shield: The model gains +2 to armor rolls.

Commissar.name: Commissar
Commissar.equipped_with: A Commissar is equipped with: Frag grenades.

option_groups.header: For each Infantry type unit selection, one Commissar may be selected that does not occupy an Elite slot.

abilities: Command Squad
Statutory Execution: Each time time a friendly unit within a 6" radius fails a Leadership test, a model is removed from the unit and the Leadership test is repeated without any penalty.

Company Command Squad.name: Company Command Squad

option_groups.header: For each HQ selection, one Company Command Squad may be selected that does not occupy an Elite slot.

One Veteran may be equipped with: +5 points Medical bag.
One Veteran may be equipped with: +10 points Heavy flamer.
Two Veterans may form a Heavy weapons team
Another Veteran may be equipped with a Special weapon

abilities: Banner: Friendly units within 12" gain +1 Leadership.

Medical bag: Once per turn, the damage of a wound against the model or attached unit can be reduced by 1. The ability must be declared after armor and invulnerability saves. Does not work against weapons with a strength of 8 or above.
Sniper: Models with a sniper rifle receive a +1 bonus to their BS value.

Crusaders.name: Crusaders
Crusaders.equipped_with: A Crusader is equipped with: Power sword; Storm shield.

option_groups.header: For each HQ selection, one Crusader unit may be selected that does not occupy an Elite slot.

abilities: Command squad, Deflect, Parry
Crusade: The model and its attached unit gain the "Frenzy(1")" ability and roll 2D6 (pick highest) for the extra movement with an Advance order.

Engineseer.name: Engineseer
Engineseer.equipped_with: An Engineseer is equipped with: Omnissiah power axe; Servo arm.

option_groups.header: For every 2 Servitors, one of them may be equipped with
For each HQ selection, one Engineseer may be selected that does not occupy an Elite slot.

abilities: Command Squad

Blessing of the Omnissiah: At the end of its move, the model may attempt to repair a vehicle within 6". On a 4+, one "Weapon destroyed" or "Engine damage" result is removed from the vehicle, or 1 hull point is restored. Alternatively, a vehicle within 6" can re-roll a hit roll and a wound or armor penetration roll.
Servitor: As long as the Engineseer is alive, Servitors get +1 to hit rolls.
